revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:October 17 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of October 17 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦10月17日'''は[[旧暦]][[10月 (旧暦)|10月]]の17日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[文治]]元年（[[1185年]]_月_日） - 堀川夜討ち。[[源頼朝]]の密命で土佐坊昌俊が京都・堀河館の[[源義経|義経]]を襲うが敗走
== 誕生日 == * [[天慶]]2年（[[939年]]_月_日） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（+ [[997年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[享和]]3年（[[1803年]]_月_日） - [[前野良沢]]、[[蘭学者]]（* [[1723年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月16日 (旧暦)|10月16日]] 翌日[[10月18日 (旧暦)|10月18日]] - 前月[[9月17日 (旧暦)|9月17日]] 翌月[[11月17日 (旧暦)|11月17日]] *新暦[[10月17日]]
{{msg:stub}}

'''旧暦10月17日'''は[[旧暦]][[10月 (旧暦)|10月]]の17日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[文治]]元年（[[1185年]]_月_日） - 堀川夜討ち。[[源頼朝]]の密命で土佐坊昌俊が京都・堀河館の[[源義経|義経]]を襲うが敗走
== 誕生日 == * [[天慶]]2年（[[939年]]_月_日） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（+ [[997年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[享和]]3年（[[1803年]]_月_日） - [[前野良沢]]、[[蘭学者]]（* [[1723年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月16日 (旧暦)|10月16日]] 翌日[[10月18日 (旧暦)|10月18日]] - 前月[[9月17日 (旧暦)|9月17日]] 翌月[[11月17日 (旧暦)|11月17日]] *新暦[[10月17日]]
{{stub}}

{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月17日'''は[[旧暦]][[10月 (旧暦)|10月]]の17日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[文治]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1185年]][[11月10日]]） - 堀川夜討ち。[[源頼朝]]の密命で土佐坊昌俊が京都・堀河館の[[源義経|義経]]を襲うが敗走
== 誕生日 == * [[天福 (中国)|天福]]4年<!-- で良いのかな? -->（ユリウス暦[[939年]][[11月30日]]） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（+ [[997年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[享和]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1803年]][[11月30日]]） - [[前野良沢]]、[[蘭学者]]（* [[1723年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月16日 (旧暦)|10月16日]] 翌日[[10月18日 (旧暦)|10月18日]] - 前月[[9月17日 (旧暦)|9月17日]] 翌月[[11月17日 (旧暦)|11月17日]] *新暦[[10月17日]]
{{stub}}

{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月17日'''は、[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の17日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[文治]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1185年]][[11月10日]]） - 堀川夜討ち。[[源頼朝]]の密命で土佐坊昌俊が京都・堀河館の[[源義経|義経]]を襲うが敗走
== 誕生日 == <!---* [[天福 (後晋)|天福]]4年（ユリウス暦[[939年]][[11月30日]]） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（+ [[997年]]）---「[[太宗 (宋)]]では"10月7日"と記載--->
== 忌日 == * [[弘安]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1280年]][[11月30日]]） - [[円爾]]、[[鎌倉時代]]中期の[[臨済宗]]の[[僧]]。（* [[1202年]]） * [[慶長]]7年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1602年]][[11月30日]]） - [[立花誾千代]]、[[立花氏]]当主（* [[1569年]]） * [[万治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1658年]][[11月30日]]） - [[真田信之]]、[[信濃国|信濃]][[上田藩]]の初代藩主、後に信濃[[松代藩]]の初代藩主。 * [[享和]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1803年]][[11月30日]]） - [[前野良沢]]、[[蘭学者]]（* [[1723年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|16|10|18|9|17|11|10|1017}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月17日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

--> == Events == * [[文治]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1185年]][[11月10日]]） - 堀川夜討ち。[[源頼朝]]の密命で土佐坊昌俊が京都・堀河館の[[源義経|義経]]を襲うが敗走
== Births == <!---* [[天福 (後晋)|天福]]4年（ユリウス暦[[939年]][[11月30日]]） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（+ [[997年]]）---「[[太宗 (宋)]]では"10月7日"と記載--->
== Deaths == * [[弘安]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1280年]][[11月30日]]） - [[円爾]]、[[鎌倉時代]]中期の[[臨済宗]]の[[僧]]。（* [[1202年]]） * [[慶長]]7年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1602年]][[11月30日]]） - [[立花誾千代]]、[[立花氏]]当主（* [[1569年]]） * [[万治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1658年]][[11月30日]]） - [[真田信之]]、[[信濃国|信濃]][[上田藩]]の初代藩主、後に信濃[[松代藩]]の初代藩主。 * [[享和]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1803年]][[11月30日]]） - [[前野良沢]]、[[蘭学者]]（* [[1723年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|16|10|18|9|17|11|10|1017}}

<!--== {{Lunar October}} ''October 17'''<!--Lunar October17 is the Nth day of 、[[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の17日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]][[Category:友引]]である。
--> == Events == * [[文治]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1185年]][[11月10日]]） - 堀川夜討ち。[[源頼朝]]の密命で土佐坊昌俊が京都・堀河館の[[源義経|義経]]を襲うが敗走
== Births == <!---* [[天福 (後晋)|天福]]4年（ユリウス暦[[939年]][[11月30日]]） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（+ [[997年]]）---「[[太宗 (宋)]]では"10月7日"と記載--->
== Deaths == * [[弘安]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1280年]][[11月30日]]） - [[円爾]]、[[鎌倉時代]]中期の[[臨済宗]]の[[僧]]。（* [[1202年]]） * [[慶長]]7年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1602年]][[11月30日]]） - [[立花誾千代]]、[[立花氏]]当主（* [[1569年]]） * [[万治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1658年]][[11月30日]]） - [[真田信之]]、[[信濃国|信濃]][[上田藩]]の初代藩主、後に信濃[[松代藩]]の初代藩主。 * [[享和]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1803年]][[11月30日]]） - [[前野良沢]]、[[蘭学者]]（* [[1723年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|10|16|10|18|9|17|11|10|1017}}

I think this is the glitch source

[[sn:October 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 17일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十七]] [[zh:十月十七]] [[en:draft:October 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * [[文治]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1185]][[11月10日]]） - 堀川夜討ち。[[源頼朝]]の密命で土佐坊昌俊が京都・堀河館の[[源義経|義経]]を襲うが敗走
== Births == <!--「[[太宗 (宋)]]では"10月7日"と記載--->
== Deaths == * [[弘安]]3rd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1280]][[11月30日]]） - [[円爾]]、[[鎌倉時代]]中期の[[臨済宗]]の[[僧]]。（* [[1202]]） * [[慶長]]7th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1602]][[11月30日]]） - [[立花誾千代]]、[[立花氏]]当主（* [[1569]]） * [[万治]]1st year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1658]][[11月30日]]） - [[真田信之]]、[[信濃国|信濃]][[上田藩]]の初代藩主、後に信濃[[松代藩]]の初代藩主。 * [[享和]]3rd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1803]][[11月30日]]） - [[前野良沢]]、[[蘭学者]]（* [[1723]]）

[[sn:October 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 17일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十七]] [[zh:十月十七]] [[en:draft:October 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 10]] ） - 堀川夜討ち。[[源頼朝]] の密命で土佐坊昌俊が京都・堀河館の[[源義経|義経]] を襲うが敗走
== Births == <!--「[[太宗 (宋)]] では"10月7日"と記載--->
== Deaths == * [[弘安]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1280]] [[November 30]] ） - [[円爾]] 、[[鎌倉時代]] 中期の[[臨済宗]] の[[僧]] 。（* [[1202]] ） * [[Keichō]] 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[November 30]] ） - [[立花誾千代]] 、[[立花氏]] 当主（* [[1569]] ） * {{ill|Manji|ja|万治}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1658]] [[November 30]] ） - [[真田信之]] 、[[信濃国|信濃]] [[上田藩]] の初代藩主、後に信濃[[松代藩]] の初代藩主。 * [[享和]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1803]] [[November 30]] ） - [[前野良沢]] 、[[蘭学者]] （* [[1723]] ）
== See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 10]] ） - 堀川夜討ち。[[源頼朝]] の密命で土佐坊昌俊が京都・堀河館の[[源義経|義経]] を襲うが敗走
== Births == <!--「[[太宗 (宋)]] では"10月7日"と記載--->
== Deaths == * [[弘安]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1280]] [[November 30]] ） - [[円爾]] 、[[鎌倉時代]] 中期の[[臨済宗]] の[[僧]] 。（* [[1202]] ） * [[Keichō]] 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[November 30]] ） - [[立花誾千代]] 、[[立花氏]] 当主（* [[1569]] ） * {{ill|Manji|ja|万治}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1658]] [[November 30]] ） - [[真田信之]] 、[[信濃国|信濃]] [[上田藩]] の初代藩主、後に信濃[[松代藩]] の初代藩主。 * [[享和]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1803]] [[November 30]] ） - [[前野良沢]] 、[[蘭学者]] （* [[1723]] ）

== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 10]] ） - 堀川夜討ち。[[源頼朝]] の密命で土佐坊昌俊が京都・堀河館の[[Minamoto no Yoshitsune|義経]] を襲うが敗走

== Deaths == * [[Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1280]] [[November 30]] ） - [[円爾]] 、[[鎌倉時代]] 中期の[[臨済宗]] の[[僧]] 。（* [[1202]] ） * [[Keichō]] 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[November 30]] ） - [[立花誾千代]] 、[[立花氏]] 当主（* [[1569]] ） * {{ill|Manji|ja|万治}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1658]] [[November 30]] ） - [[真田信之]] 、[[信濃国|信濃]] [[上田藩]] の初代藩主、後に信濃[[松代藩]] の初代藩主。 * [[享和]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1803]] [[November 30]] ） - [[前野良沢]] 、[[蘭学者]] （* [[1723]] ）

[[sn:October 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 17일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十七]] [[zh:十月十七]] [[en:draft:October 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 10]] ） - 堀川夜討ち。[[源頼朝]] の密命で土佐坊昌俊が京都・堀河館の[[Minamoto no Yoshitsune|義経]] を襲うが敗走
== Births == <!--「[[太宗 (宋)]] では"10月7日"と記載--->
== Deaths == * [[Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1280]] [[November 30]] ） - [[円爾]] 、[[鎌倉時代]] 中期の[[臨済宗]] の[[Monk]] 。（* [[1202]] ） * [[Keichō]] 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[November 30]] ） - [[立花誾千代]] 、[[立花氏]] 当主（* [[1569]] ） * {{ill|Manji|ja|万治}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1658]] [[November 30]] ） - [[真田信之]] 、[[信濃国|信濃]] [[上田藩]] の初代藩主、後に信濃[[松代藩]] の初代藩主。 * [[享和]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1803]] [[November 30]] ） - [[前野良沢]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] （* [[1723]] ）== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|16|10|18|9|17|11|10|1017}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Japanese Traditional Lunar Months" to "Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 17일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十七]] [[zh:十月十七]] [[en:draft:October 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 10]] ） - 堀川夜討ち。[[源頼朝]] の密命で土佐坊昌俊が京都・堀河館の[[Minamoto no Yoshitsune|義経]] を襲うが敗走
== Births == <!--「[[太宗 (宋)]] では"10月7日"と記載--->
== Deaths == * [[Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1280]] [[November 30]] ） - [[円爾]] 、[[鎌倉時代]] 中期の[[臨済宗]] の[[Monk]] 。（* [[1202]] ） * [[Keichō]] 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[November 30]] ） - [[立花誾千代]] 、[[立花氏]] 当主（* [[1569]] ） * {{ill|Manji|ja|万治}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1658]] [[November 30]] ） - [[真田信之]] 、[[信濃国|信濃]] [[上田藩]] の初代藩主、後に信濃[[松代藩]] の初代藩主。 * [[享和]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1803]] [[November 30]] ） - [[前野良沢]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] （* [[1723]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|16|10|18|9|17|11|10|1017}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 10]] ） - 堀川夜討ち。[[源頼朝]] の密命で土佐坊昌俊が京都・堀河館の[[Minamoto no Yoshitsune|義経]] を襲うが敗走
== Births == <!--「[[太宗 (宋)]] では"10月7日"と記載--->
== Deaths == * [[Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1280]] [[November 30]] ） - [[円爾]] 、[[鎌倉時代]] 中期の[[臨済宗]] の[[Monk]] 。（* [[1202]] ） * [[Keichō]] 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[November 30]] ） - [[立花誾千代]] 、[[立花氏]] 当主（* [[1569]] ） * {{ill|Manji|ja|万治}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1658]] [[November 30]] ） - [[真田信之]] 、[[信濃国|信濃]] [[上田藩]] の初代藩主、後に信濃[[松代藩]] の初代藩主。 * [[享和]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1803]] [[November 30]] ） - [[前野良沢]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] （* [[1723]] ）

revision.text:
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十七]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft}} .
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 10]] ） - 堀川夜討ち。[[源頼朝]] の密命で土佐坊昌俊が京都・堀河館の[[Minamoto no Yoshitsune|義経]] を襲うが敗走
== Births == <!--「[[太宗 (宋)]] では"10月7日"と記載--->
== Deaths == * [[Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1280]] [[November 30]] ） - [[円爾]] 、[[鎌倉時代]] 中期の[[臨済宗]] の[[Monk]] 。（* [[1202]] ） * [[Keichō]] 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[November 30]] ） - [[立花誾千代]] 、[[立花氏]] 当主（* [[1569]] ） * {{ill|Manji|ja|万治|12=draft}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1658]] [[November 30]] ） - [[真田信之]] 、[[信濃国|信濃]] [[上田藩]] の初代藩主、後に信濃[[松代藩]] の初代藩主。 * [[享和]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1803]] [[November 30]] ） - [[前野良沢]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] （* [[1723]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|16|10|18|9|17|11|10|1017}}
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十七]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十七]]

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十七]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (Old Calendar)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦 (Old Calendar)|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyo|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft}}.
== Events == * [[文治]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[November 10]]) – Horikawa Night Raid. Under the secret orders of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}}, Tosa-bō Masatoki attacked the Horikawa Hall in Kyoto where {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|義経}} was present, but was repelled.
== Births == <!-- In [[Taizong (Song)]] it is recorded as "October 7" -->
== Deaths == * [[Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1280]] [[November 30]]) – Enni, a monk of the Rinzai sect during the mid-Kamakura period (born [[1202]]). * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[November 30]]) – Tachibana Kinchiyo, head of the Tachibana clan (born [[1569]]). * {{ill|Manji|ja|万治|12=draft}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1658]] [[November 30]]) – Sanada Nobuyuki, the first lord of the Ueda Domain in Shinano, later the first lord of the Matsushiro Domain in Shinano. * [[享和]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1803]] [[November 30]]) – Maeno Ryōsaku, a Rangaku (Dutch Learning) scholar (born [[1723]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|16|10|18|9|17|11|10|1017}}

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840266]] Wikidata name: 17th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 17|qq=October 17}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (Old Calendar)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦 (Old Calendar)|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyo|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyo|qq=|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:文治|文治]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]]) – Horikawa Night Raid. Under the secret orders of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]], Tosa-bō Masatoki attacked the Horikawa Hall in Kyoto where {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|義経|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshitsune|qq=}} was present, but was repelled.
== Births ==

== Events == * [[:en:文治|文治]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]]) – Horikawa Night Raid. Under the secret orders of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]], Tosa-bō Masatoki attacked the Horikawa Hall in Kyoto where {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|義経|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshitsune|qq=}} was present, but was repelled.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1280|1280]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]) – Enni, a monk of the Rinzai sect during the mid-Kamakura period (born [[:en:1202|1202]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1602|1602]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]) – Tachibana Kinchiyo, head of the Tachibana clan (born [[:en:1569|1569]]). * [[:en:Manji (era)|Manji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1658|1658]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]) – Sanada Nobuyuki, the first lord of the Ueda Domain in Shinano, later the first lord of the Matsushiro Domain in Shinano. * [[:en:享和|享和]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1803|1803]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]) – Maeno Ryōsaku, a Rangaku (Dutch Learning) scholar (born [[:en:1723|1723]]).

Its {{ill|Rokuyo|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyo|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:文治|文治]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]]) – Horikawa Night Raid. Under the secret orders of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]], Tosa-bō Masatoki attacked the Horikawa Hall in Kyoto where {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|義経|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshitsune|qq=}} was present, but was repelled.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1280|1280]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]) – Enni, a monk of the Rinzai sect during the mid-Kamakura period (born [[:en:1202|1202]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1602|1602]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]) – Tachibana Kinchiyo, head of the Tachibana clan (born [[:en:1569|1569]]). * [[:en:Manji (era)|Manji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1658|1658]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]) – Sanada Nobuyuki, the first lord of the Ueda Domain in Shinano, later the first lord of the Matsushiro Domain in Shinano. * [[:en:享和|享和]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1803|1803]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]) – Maeno Ryōsaku, a Rangaku (Dutch Learning) scholar (born [[:en:1723|1723]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十七]][[zh:十月十七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840266]] Wikidata name: 17th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 17|qq=October 17}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (Old Calendar)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦 (Old Calendar)|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyo|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyo|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:文治|文治]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]]) – Horikawa Night Raid. Under the secret orders of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]], Tosa-bō Masatoki attacked the Horikawa Hall in Kyoto where {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|義経|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshitsune|qq=}} was present, but was repelled.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1280|1280]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]) – Enni, a monk of the Rinzai sect during the mid-Kamakura period (born [[:en:1202|1202]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1602|1602]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]) – Tachibana Kinchiyo, head of the Tachibana clan (born [[:en:1569|1569]]). * [[:en:Manji (era)|Manji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1658|1658]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]) – Sanada Nobuyuki, the first lord of the Ueda Domain in Shinano, later the first lord of the Matsushiro Domain in Shinano. * [[:en:享和|享和]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1803|1803]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]) – Maeno Ryōsaku, a Rangaku (Dutch Learning) scholar (born [[:en:1723|1723]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|16|10|18|9|17|11|10|1017|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:文治|文治]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]]) – Horikawa Night Raid. Under the secret orders of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]], Tosa-bō Masatoki attacked the Horikawa Hall in Kyoto where {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|義経|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshitsune|qq=}} was present, but was repelled.

== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1280|1280]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]) – Enni, a monk of the Rinzai sect during the mid-Kamakura period (born [[:en:1202|1202]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1602|1602]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]) – Tachibana Kinchiyo, head of the Tachibana clan (born [[:en:1569|1569]]). * [[:en:Manji (era)|Manji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1658|1658]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]) – Sanada Nobuyuki, the first lord of the Ueda Domain in Shinano, later the first lord of the Matsushiro Domain in Shinano. * [[:en:享和|享和]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1803|1803]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]) – Maeno Ryōsaku, a Rangaku (Dutch Learning) scholar (born [[:en:1723|1723]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十七]][[zh:十月十七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十七]][[zh:十月十七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十七]][[zh:十月十七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840266]] Wikidata name: 17th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 17|qq=October 17}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (Old Calendar)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦 (Old Calendar)|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyo|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyo|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:文治|文治]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]]) – Horikawa Night Raid. Under the secret orders of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]], Tosa-bō Masatoki attacked the Horikawa Hall in Kyoto where {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|義経|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshitsune|qq=}} was present, but was repelled.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1280|1280]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]) – Enni, a monk of the Rinzai sect during the mid-Kamakura period (born [[:en:1202|1202]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1602|1602]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]) – Tachibana Kinchiyo, head of the Tachibana clan (born [[:en:1569|1569]]). * [[:en:Manji (era)|Manji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1658|1658]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]) – Sanada Nobuyuki, the first lord of the Ueda Domain in Shinano, later the first lord of the Matsushiro Domain in Shinano. * [[:en:享和|享和]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1803|1803]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]]) – Maeno Ryōsaku, a Rangaku (Dutch Learning) scholar (born [[:en:1723|1723]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|16|10|18|9|17|11|10|1017|qq=}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyo|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyo|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:文治|文治]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1185|en|1185|WD=Q19729|lt=1185|1=1185}} {{ill|November 10|en|November 10|WD=Q2988|lt=November 10|1=November 10}}) – Horikawa Night Raid. Under the secret orders of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|WD=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo|1=Minamoto no Yoritomo}}, Tosa-bō Masatoki attacked the Horikawa Hall in Kyoto where {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|義経|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshitsune|qq=}} was present, but was repelled.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōan (Kamakura period)|en|Kōan (Kamakura period)|WD=Q389180|lt=Kōan|1=Kōan (Kamakura period)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1280|en|1280|WD=Q5536|lt=1280|1=1280}} {{ill|November 30|en|November 30|WD=Q3015|lt=November 30|1=November 30}}) – Enni, a monk of the Rinzai sect during the mid-Kamakura period (born {{ill|1202|en|1202|WD=Q5226|lt=1202|1=1202}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1602|en|1602|WD=Q6727|lt=1602|1=1602}} {{ill|November 30|en|November 30|WD=Q3015|lt=November 30|1=November 30}}) – Tachibana Kinchiyo, head of the Tachibana clan (born {{ill|1569|en|1569|WD=Q6653|lt=1569|1=1569}}). * {{ill|Manji (era)|en|Manji (era)|WD=Q1145295|lt=Manji|1=Manji (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1658|en|1658|WD=Q6991|lt=1658|1=1658}} {{ill|November 30|en|November 30|WD=Q3015|lt=November 30|1=November 30}}) – Sanada Nobuyuki, the first lord of the Ueda Domain in Shinano, later the first lord of the Matsushiro Domain in Shinano. * [[:en:享和|享和]] 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1803|en|1803|WD=Q6887|lt=1803|1=1803}} {{ill|November 30|en|November 30|WD=Q3015|lt=November 30|1=November 30}}) – Maeno Ryōsaku, a Rangaku (Dutch Learning) scholar (born {{ill|1723|en|1723|WD=Q6921|lt=1723|1=1723}}).
